channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — After watching quarterback Josh Allen bounce off two Kansas City Chiefs defenders before crossing the goal line on a 26-yard run, Bills receiver Khalil Shakir joined the rest of the packed Buffalo stadium by screaming at the top of his lungs.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Backup QB Arbuckle leads Toronto past Winnipeg 41-24 for the Argonauts' 19th Grey Cup title
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — Backup quarterback Nick Arbuckle led the Toronto Argonauts to their record-extending 19th Grey Cup title, throwing two second-half touchdown passes in a 41-24 victory over the Winnipeg Blue Bombers on Sunday night at B.C. Place.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Raiders' Brock Bowers and other NFL players celebrate TDs with Trump-inspired dance moves
item.description: The Trump dance is becoming a trend around the NFL. Raiders tight end Brock Bowers, Titans wide receiver Calvin Ridley and Lions defensive end Za’Darius Smith followed Nick Bosa’s lead and celebrated big plays on Sunday with dance moves inspired by President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA fines Hornets star LaMelo Ball $100K for anti-gay comment during postgame interview
item.description: Charlotte Hornets do-it-all point guard LaMelo Ball was fined $100,000 for making an anti-gay comment during his postgame interview after beating the Milwaukee Bucks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jordan Love runs for go-ahead TD and Packers beat Bears on Karl Brooks' FG block at buzzer
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Jordan Love and the Green Bay Packers made just enough plays to squeeze out yet another win over the Chicago Bears. This time, it took a late touchdown and a blocked field goal.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Dallas Wings win the WNBA draft lottery, earning the No. 1 pick next year
item.description: The Dallas Wings won the WNBA draft lottery Sunday and the chance to draft UConn star Paige Bueckers with the No. 1 pick.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jon Jones calls UFC 309 'biggest moment of my life' after KO, doing Trump's dance move
item.description: UFC champion Jon Jones, who defeated Stipe Miocic and did President-elect Trump's dance move, called Saturday night's affair the most memorable of his career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL fans torch officials after questionable call in Titans-Vikings game
item.description: NFL fans were roiled by another questionable call from a referee during a game between the Minnesota Vikings and Tennessee Titans on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kansas upsets No. 7 BYU 17-13, handing the Cougars their first loss of the season
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) — Jalon Daniels threw for 169 yards, Dylan Neal ran for two touchdowns and Kansas upset No. 7 BYU 17-13 on Saturday night to hand the Cougars their first loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Oregon rallies in 4th quarter to beat Wisconsin 16-13
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Oregon was trailing by seven points as Wisconsin fans were jumping around to open the fourth quarter. The top-ranked Ducks didn’t flinch.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State crushes Hawaii, 55-10
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Rahsul Faison rushed for 192 yards and two touchdowns, as the Utah State football team cruised past Hawaii Saturday at Maverik Stadium, 55-10.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Draymond Green's foul against Zach Edey is upgraded by the NBA to a flagrant 1
item.description: Golden State forward Draymond Green's foul against Memphis' Zach Edey in the third quarter of the Warriors' victory over the Grizzlies has been upgraded to a category-one flagrant, the NBA said Saturday after reviewing the play.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls look to break Rockets' 4-game win streak Sunday
item.description: Houston Rockets (9-4, third in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (5-8, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 7 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Houston is looking to prolong its four-game win streak with a victory against Chicago. The Bulls are 1-4 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NYU women's basketball team holds national title ceremony
item.description: GREENWICH VILLAGE, Manhattan (PIX11) — The NYU women’s basketball team kicked off their home game Friday night with a ring ceremony honoring last season’s historic, undefeated run that earned them the national championship.
item.dc:creator: Zhané Caldwell, PIX 11

item.title: Watch out MLB! Keep an eye out for Roki Sasaki
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- As all the attention in baseball is focused on Juan Soto, Scott Boras, and his free agency, there is another that should draw attention as well. That is Japanese righty Roki Sasaki. The 23-year-old really flashed in the World Baseball Classic a couple of years ago.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Clippers write love letter to Los Angeles with new City Edition uniforms
item.description: With the NBA now in full swing and the brand-new Intuit Dome open for business, the Los Angeles Clippers have unveiled their City Edition uniforms for the new season. The new look, which the team says symbolizes the story and work of L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodgers fan claims he was fired for calling in sick, attending World Series parade
item.description: People are willing to go to great lengths to support their beloved sports teams—one person even lost his job for it. A Los Angeles Dodgers fan claims he was fired after being spotted at the team's World Series victory parade after calling in sick for work.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodger Stadium improvements could provide leg-up in team's pursuit of World Series repeat
item.description: Work has begun at Dodger Stadium, including renovations to the home team clubhouse, which houses team lockers, showers and communal areas.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation
